channel.title: jb-marketplace-plugins-jetbrains
channel.description: The latest JetBrains plugins on the JetBrains marketplace
channel.dc:creator: Jonathan Lermitage

item.title: OpenApi-Helper - Mon Jun 29 13:30:47 UTC 2026
item.description:
OpenAPI Helper is an IntelliJ IDEA plugin that enables seamless navigation from OpenAPI YAML contracts to their corresponding Java or Kotlin implementations.
vendor: Malt Community downloads: 7 pricingModel: FREE xmlId: com.malt.openapi-helper
